Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an example DECLARE model. Our task is to add new constraints to mitigate bias in a loan application review process. First lets understand the existing model. It has existence StartApplication and FinalDecision are required init StartApplication is first coexistence StartApplication and FinalDecision response After StartApplication there must be RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In DECLARE succession means if A occurs then B must eventually occur and if B occurs then A must have occurred before. Combined with other constraints the process enforces StartApplication then RequestAdditionalInfo then FinalDecision with possible other activities in between

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process might have sensitive attribute checks like CheckApplicantRace that could lead to biased decisions like Reject following directly without checks

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: To mitigate bias ensure fairness by requiring manual review or bias checks before decisions especially after sensitive attribute revelation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Introduce new activities CheckSensitiveAttributes ManualReview Approve Reject and add constraints like existence for CheckSensitiveAttributes response from CheckSensitiveAttributes to ManualReview precedence from ManualReview to Approve Reject FinalDecision nonchainsuccession from CheckSensitiveAttributes to Approve Reject FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Precedence from ManualReview to FinalDecision and existence of FinalDecision forces ManualReview in every trace before decision nonchainsuccession prevents immediate biased decisions

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Keep original constraints intact add new ones involving new activities to extend the model without removing existing ones
